introSection:
Mad Mouse was an Arrow Dynamics wild mouse roller coaster located at Myrtle Beach Pavilion in Myrtle Beach, South Carolina, USA. It operated from June 13, 1998 to September 30, 2006, when the park closed. It sat in storage at Broadway Grand Prix after being dismantled. Its status is now unknown.

The ride was the first of four Mad Mouse models built by Arrow Dynamics and the only one not bought by Cedar Fair. Its track and structure were engineered by Ride Centerline.
fullText:
Mad Mouse was an Arrow Dynamics wild mouse roller coaster located at Myrtle Beach Pavilion in Myrtle Beach, South Carolina, USA. It operated from June 13, 1998 to September 30, 2006, when the park closed. It sat in storage at Broadway Grand Prix after being dismantled. Its status is now unknown.

The ride was the first of four Mad Mouse models built by Arrow Dynamics and the only one not bought by Cedar Fair. Its track and structure were engineered by Ride Centerline.
